note: Tables default to Single/Size=4 borders on all sides. Length props use twips (raw int) or unit-qualified. Data can be seeded via 'data' (semicolon rows, comma cells) or per-cell 'r{R}c{C}' props.

data.description: inline CSV-ish data ('H1,H2;R1C1,R1C2') or CSV file/URL/data-URI resolvable by FileSource.

colWidths.description: comma-separated per-column widths in twips. Aliases: colwidths.
colWidths.readback: comma-separated column widths in OOXML units

direction.description: Reading direction (Arabic / Hebrew). 'rtl' writes <w:bidiVisual/> on tblPr (mirrors column order); 'ltr' clears it. Distinct from per-cell textDirection.
direction.readback: rtl when set, key absent otherwise

width.description: table width in twips (Dxa) or percent ('50%' → Pct).

cellSpacing.description: space between cells in twips. Alias: cellspacing.

padding.description: default cell padding (all four sides) in twips. Add/Set only — Get does not surface the table-default cell margin today.

border.all.description: set top/bottom/left/right AND inside horizontal/vertical borders at once. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. SIZE is in 1/8 pt units (4 = 0.5pt). Aliases: border. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.top.description: outer top border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units). Add/Set only — table-level border readback is not surfaced today; inspect per-cell border.top instead.

border.bottom.description: outer bottom border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR'. Add/Set only — read per-cell.

border.left.description: outer left border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form. Add/Set only — read per-cell.

border.right.description: outer right border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Add/Set only — read per-cell.

border.horizontal.description: inside horizontal borders (between rows). Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Alias: border.insideH. Add/Set only — Get does not surface table-level inside borders today.

border.vertical.description: inside vertical borders (between columns). Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Alias: border.insideV. Add/Set only — Get does not surface table-level inside borders today.
